content: P9 'human-legible run reports' (issue #64) shipped as an END-TO-END THIN VERTICAL (not P7/P8's pure-substrate-first slicing) — the maintainer chose user-visible value now over a rubric-first foundation. Three coupled pieces, all on branch feat/p9-human-legible-reports. (1) CONTRACT REBUILD: templates/quality-report.md body reordered LAYPERSON-FIRST — `## Verdict` (unchanged), then plain-prose `## What Changed` / `## Why` / `## How To Verify` / `## What To Watch` / `## What I Was Unsure About` (no jargon/paths/SHAs), then a `_Engineer detail below — a non-engineer can stop reading here._` divider, then the engineer sections `## Task Source` / `## Evidence` / `## Human Acceptance Checklist` / `## Gaps And Follow-Ups`. The old structured 'What Changed' bullets (Summary/Commits/Files) collapsed: Summary->prose What Changed, Commits/Files->Evidence implementation line. The `# Otto quality report` H1 is STABLE and load-bearing — it is the persistence content-marker (below) — and the Verdict honest-default discipline is unchanged. Every run mode inherits the new shape through the single @include (ghprompt-workflow.md/verify.md/apply-review.md); NO per-template drift. (2) PERSISTENCE: run-report.ts gained `writeRunReport(ws,runId,text)` (best-effort, swallows errors, ensures trailing newline — NEVER throws, mirrors removeStageRecords) / `readRunReport(ws,runId): string|null` (absent->null) / `REPORT_MARKER='# Otto quality report'` / `hasRunReport(result)` (keys on the H1 CONTENT, not the stage name, because which stage emits the report differs per mode: the IMPLEMENTER emits it in ghafk/verify/apply-review/linear; the REVIEWER never does; afk/plan-mode emits NONE). loop.ts: a `let lastReportText: string|null` is set to the most recent `sr.result` that hasRunReport (captured right after recordStage, before the s===0 sentinel check, so a finishing gate result carrying BOTH report+sentinel is still captured); finalizeManifest writes it to .otto/runs/<id>/report.md BEFORE writeManifest so collectArtifacts links a `{kind:'report'}` RunArtifact via existsSync (same existence-gated pattern as review-followups). No marker -> nothing written, no artifact (graceful for afk/older runs). (3) OTTO-EXPLAIN: NEW report-explain.ts — pure `formatPlainReport(manifest, reportText|null)` prints the persisted prose report first then a '— Run facts —' footer (What ran / Asked to do / Effort = `<completed> of <total> iterations . $cost` / Outcome=exitReason); reportText null -> 'this run didn't emit a plain-language report (older run or plan/PRD afk mode)' note + the facts. `runExplain(argv,deps)` MIRRORS runInspect exactly (resolve <run-id>|latest via listRunIds at(-1), readManifest, clean err+exit 1 on unknown id / no runs). NEW thin bin apps/cli/bin/otto-explain.js + package.json bin entry; otto-inspect stays the engineer view. All exported from index.ts. GOTCHA: scripts/quality-report-samples.test.mjs (root `pnpm test`) PARSES the contract's `## ` headings as its source of truth AND asserts every one of the 4 sample reports in docs/quality-report-samples.md contains all of them — so changing the contract sections REQUIRES updating both that test's hardcoded expected array AND all 4 samples (done: 10 sections now). Verified: full `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test && pnpm test` green (core 1005, root 79); manual `otto-explain latest` (fallback path) + a synthetic report.md (present path) both render correctly. DEFERRED follow-ups (named in .otto/tasks/issue-64/plan.md): a pure report-rubric.ts legibility scorer + eval signal (the '% understood without code' metric proxy, P8-shaped); afk report coverage (prompt.md does NOT @include quality-report.md, so plan/PRD runs emit + persist no report — a real gap vs the contract comment's claim); embedded before/after evidence (persist the HEAD diff patch + screenshots as artifacts); an otto-inspect --plain alias.
